li-wenliang.name: Dr. Li Wenliang
li-wenliang.description: Warned the world and paid the ultimate price. 🩺

jacinda-ardern.name: Jacinda Ardern
jacinda-ardern.description: Proved that empathy constitutes strong leadership. 🇳🇿

total-containment.title: The Wuhan Scare 🛡️🌏
total-containment.description: The virus is contained in January 2020. No global pandemic.
total-containment.divergence_description: Early and total lockdown of Hubei province.
total-containment.present_day_status: COVID-19 is a trivia question. "Remember that scary virus in China?" Remote work is still a niche concept. 💼🚫

virus-crushed.title: Virus Eliminated
virus-crushed.description: The WHO declares the outbreak over in March 2020.

black-death-variant.title: The Delta Collapse ☠️🏚️
black-death-variant.description: A lethal mutation destroys global civilization.
black-death-variant.present_day_status: People live in isolated villages. Strangers are shot on sight. Zoom is the only government. 💻🔫

local-internet.consequence: Mesh networks replace the global internet

open-source-vaccine.title: Vaccine for All 💉🌍
open-source-vaccine.description: Patents are waived. The Global South is vaccinated by mid-2021.
open-source-vaccine.present_day_status: The "Helsinki Accords" guarantee medicine as a human right. The Global South is rising fast. 🌍🚀

global-immunity.title: Herd Immunity
global-immunity.description: The virus runs out of hosts. Variants stop evolving.

wuhan-warning.title: The Whistleblower (Dec 2019)
wuhan-warning.text: Wuhan. Dr. Li Wenliang has posted a warning about "SARS-like pneumonia". The police summon you. Do you silence him?

silence.consequence: The virus spreads in secret. The global pandemic becomes inevitable.

listen.text: Listen to him. Quarantine the city NOW.
listen.consequence: It is drastic, but effective. The virus is trapped.

lockdown-decision.title: To Close or Not to Close (March 2020)
lockdown-decision.text: The virus is here. Scientists want a lockdown. The economy will crash. What is more important?

lockdown.consequence: The economy tanks, but hospitals survive. (Historical)

open.text: Keep it open. "It's just the flu."
open.consequence: Mass death. Healthcare collapse. You are voted out.

vaccine-equity.title: The Vaccine Apartheid (2021)
vaccine-equity.text: We have the vaccine. The Global South has none. Pharma wants to protect patents.

protect-patents.consequence: Poor countries wait. Omicron emerges from the unvaccinated.

waive-patents.text: Waive the patents. Share the recipe.
waive-patents.consequence: Factories open worldwide. The virus is cornered.
